title: ChatPing
description: A mod that notifies you when your name is said in chat
body:
This mod allows you to set a list of names/words that get's checked for with each message received and plays a sound when the message contains one of the names.

![settings](https://i.imgur.com/AScd3Z5.png)

Adds Searchable settings that include:

*   List of names/words
*   Sound that gets played when one of the words is mentioned in chat
*   Volume slider to adjust the sound volume
*   Pitch slider to adjust the pitch of the sound
